rationale.R1.1: Contribution claims are asserted but undercut by the mid-passage concession that learned constraints offer no advantage; the thesis needs tightening so the framing of the frontier as a methodological contribution survives its own findings.
rationale.R1.2: There is an internal logical tension: the text simultaneously positions the frontier as a novel analytical contribution and uses it to demonstrate that a major class of strategies (PPO, CMDP) fails — the reasoning connecting these two moves is compressed and needs to be made coherent.
rationale.R1.4: The novelty claim ('first analytical tool') and the differentiation from prior work ('aggregate statistics vs. tail-risk behavior') are present but asserted rather than argued; strengthening requires sharpening the delta against nearest prior work.
rationale.R1.5: The narrative arc oscillates — contribution claim, data summary, contribution re-claim, data implication, contribution re-claim again — producing a repetitive structure that dilutes impact; a cleaner arc would front-load the gap, present the frontier once, then deliver findings.
rationale.R1.6: The delegation 'make this stronger' is load-bearing on prose quality: sentences are passive in places, hedges are misplaced, and key claims are buried mid-paragraph rather than foregrounded for maximum rhetorical force.
